title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
